narrative: 12 open tickets in the last 30 days, 5 marked high-priority, average time-to-close 38h. Opera-PMS integration showing 25% error rate for 7 days. Three active deals stalled in 'Contract Sent' for 45+ days.

actions.rationale: 7-day failure rate at 25% — auto-create incident, ping support lead.
